name: Clearbit
description: Connects to the Clearbit B2B data enrichment API to look up company and person data by domain or email. Clearbit is a lookup-based API — use enrich_company(), enrich_person(), and combined_lookup() to retrieve enrichment data on demand.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Your Clearbit API key. Found in your Clearbit dashboard under Settings → API Keys.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate the api_key by calling enrich_company('clearbit.com'). Returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE with the failure reason.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping the Clearbit company API and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Clearbit is a lookup-based API with no bulk list endpoint. sync() returns COMPLETED with 0 documents. Use enrich_company(), enrich_person(), or combined_lookup() for on-demand enrichment.

methods.name: Enrich Company
methods.description: Look up a company by domain and return a normalized ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: Enrich Person
methods.description: Look up a person by email and return a normalized ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: Combined Lookup
methods.description: Look up a person and their company simultaneously by email and return a single normalized ConnectorDocument.

apis.name: Install / Authenticate
apis.description: Validate that api_key is present and accepted by Clearbit.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Ping Clearbit by enriching clearbit.com and return current health.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Clearbit is a lookup-based enrichment API, not a list-based data store.

apis.name: Enrich Company
apis.description: Enrich a company by domain via GET /v2/companies/find?domain={domain}.

apis.name: Enrich Person
apis.description: Enrich a person by email via GET /v2/people/find?email={email}.

apis.name: Combined Lookup
apis.description: Perform a combined person + company lookup by email.
